title: ovilla humilis
intro: Ovilla humilis, also known as the Dwarf Mistletoe, is a type of parasitic plant that grows on the branches of its host tree. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. The health benefits of Ovilla humilis include its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, as well as its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments such as arthritis and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Ovilla humilis can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water, or by drying and powdering them for use in teas, tinctures, or capsules.
